name: governor
description: Budget-aware agent loop for Claude Code: per-turn context + quota awareness injected into the model, graded economy policy, durable checkpoints, and clean resume after usage-limit interruptions.

contract_mode.title: Subagent contract mode
contract_mode.description: How the durable-output contract reaches subagent prompts: allow (rewrite + auto-approve spawn, most compatible), passive (rewrite only), or off

economy_pct.title: ECONOMY threshold (%)
economy_pct.description: Context / 5-hour usage percentage where the model is told to economize

winddown_pct.title: WIND-DOWN threshold (%)
winddown_pct.description: Usage percentage where the model must finish the current unit and start nothing new

checkpoint_pct.title: CHECKPOINT threshold (%)
checkpoint_pct.description: Usage percentage where the model must write .governor/RESUME.md and end the turn cleanly
